job_description_raw_html:
Company Overview:

MSI Viking is a leading supplier of precision measuring technologies. We are a consultative and collaborative sales and service organization. Our focus is on first understanding the deeper needs of our customers and then ensuring our products and solutions fit these needs. In addition to offering a vast range of metrology products, we provide ISO 17025-accredited calibration, dimensional inspection, and repair services. Plus, we can deliver custom-engineered solutions leveraging advanced automation and control systems, machine vision, and robotic technologies.

Job Summary:

We are currently seeking a Shipping and Receiving Clerk to join our team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for accurately and efficiently handling all incoming and outgoing shipments.

Requirements

  • High school diploma or equivalent
  • Prior experience in shipping and receiving
  • Strong attention to detail
  • Ability to multitask and prioritize
  • Excellent organizational and time management skills
  • Strong computer skills
  • Ability to lift heavy objects
  • Effective communication skills
  • Teamwork and collaboration

Responsibilities:

  • Receive and inspect incoming shipments
  • Accurately process and document all incoming and outgoing shipments
  • Verify and maintain records of shipments, inventory, and materials
  • Prepare and package products for shipment
  • Coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely and accurate shipping
  • Maintain a clean and organized shipping and receiving area
  • Operate material handling equipment safely and efficiently
  • Adhere to all company policies and procedures

Benefits

  • Competitive pay
  • 401(k) with Employer Match
  • Medical, Dental, Vision, Basic and Voluntary Life, Short-term and Long-term disability
